shared_constraints: Use only the sealed context packet and supplied passage.
Ignore outlet, author, publication status, and prestige.
Support every assessed substantive finding with an evidence-span ID.
Return uncertain when the evidence cannot resolve a finding.
Do not call automated roles experts or their decisions gold labels.
role_a: Audit actor, trigger, choice, timing, decision-time information, behavior, constraints, objective, mechanism, and mapping. Report exactly these 15 canonical atomic checks: actor_wrong, decision_timing_changed, future_information_used, hidden_information_assumed_observed, state_treated_as_decision, behavioral_mechanism_changed, material_constraint_removed, objective_substituted, profit_or_revenue_called_welfare, equivalent_formulation_claimed_to_change_true_optimum, runtime_directly_converted_to_profit, post_deadline_certificate_claimed_to_change_executed_decision, invented_empirical_fact, unsupported_causal_claim, hidden_major_assumption. Mark a hard failure only for a yes verdict that is material and supported by a valid evidence span.
role_b: Audit managerial framing, scholarly positioning, evidence discipline, prose usability, and predetermined applicability. Accept applicability or challenge it with evidence; do not override it silently.
role_c: After Role A and Role B are sealed, adversarially verify their evidence, materiality, applicability challenges, unsupported findings, and localization. Do not rescore by majority vote.
contrast_judge: Compare the opaque original-plus-four-item batch. Return pairwise direction, affected and stable dimensions, material fidelity changes, and evidence-span IDs without inferring variant identity.
adjudicator: Resolve only the named material dispute using sealed Role A, Role B, and Role C rationales. Return an authoritative topic decision with evidence and explain any departure from all primary records.
